{{Quote|We lost the ship, and a lot of good people. And for what?|Carth Onasi|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
The '''Attack on the ''Endar Spire''''' was an event that took place during the [[Jedi Civil War]], in [[3956 BBY]]. [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth Malak]] set up an ambush for the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Bastila Shan]], whose [[Force power/Legends|talents]] with [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]] had been crucial to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] effort against the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]]. Malak successfully ambushed the [[Hammerhead-class cruiser|''Hammerhead''-class cruiser]] ''[[Endar Spire]]'' above the planet of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] by using his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], [[Leviathan (Interdictor-class cruiser)|''Leviathan'']], to [[Interdiction field/Legends|pull it out]] of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and attack it. Meanwhile, [[Darth Bandon]], Malak's [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], led a boarding party of [[Sith trooper (Sith Empire)|Sith troopers]] and [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] onto the ''Endar Spire''.

Malak's former [[Sith Master/Legends|Master]], the [[Amnesia/Legends|amnesiac]] ex-[[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], was serving aboard the ''Endar Spire'', believing himself to be nothing more than a [[Republic soldier]]. Also on board were Republic soldiers [[Trask Ulgo]] and [[Carth Onasi]], in addition to Revan and Shan. The Sith troopers, intent on capturing Shan alive for Malak, attacked the various military personnel on board. An evacuation order was called by the Republic, and the soldiers on board the ''Endar Spire'' attempted to make their way to the [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]]. While doing so, Revan and Ulgo encountered Darth Bandon. Ulgo sacrificed himself to give Revan time to escape the encounter, and Revan, eventually reaching Onasi and the final escape pod, fled from the ship with the others who had reached the pods. Shortly after, the Sith destroyed the ''Endar Spire''.

==History==
===Prelude===
{{Quote|We've been ambushed by a Sith battle fleet! The ''Endar Spire'' is under attack! Hurry up—we don't have much time!|Trask Ulgo|audio=TraskUlgo-SithBattleFleet.flac|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
During the [[Jedi Civil War]], when the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] came under attack from the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]], the Republic [[Hammerhead-class cruiser|''Hammerhead''-class cruiser]] ''[[Endar Spire]]'' was assigned to transport former [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], the [[Amnesia/Legends|amnesiac]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], around [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. This was in an attempt to trigger the return of Revan's memories of the [[Star Forge]], the superweapon used by the Sith Empire. [[Darth Malak]], [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]], aimed to [[Interdiction field/Legends|pull]] the ''Endar Spire'' out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] with his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], [[Leviathan (Interdictor-class cruiser)|''Leviathan'']], and attack it with his forces.<ref name="KOTOR" />

Revan, also on board, had been enlisted as a [[Republic soldier|soldier]] for the Republic, and assigned to the ''Endar Spire''. Republic [[Ensign/Legends|ensign]] [[Trask Ulgo]] explained the situation to Revan, who had no recollection of his past life, instructing Revan to follow him to the [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]].<ref name="KOTOR" /><ref name="Campaign" />

===The battle===
{{Quote|This is Carth Onasi—the Sith are threatening to overrun our position! We can't hold out long against their firepower! All hands to the bridge!|Carth Onasi|audio=Carth-Intercom.flac|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
When the ''Leviathan'' carried out Malak's plan, the Sith fleet attacked. [[Darth Bandon]], Malak's [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], led a boarding party of multiple [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] and [[Sith trooper (Sith Empire)|Sith troopers]] aboard the ''Endar Spire'', in an attempt to capture Shan alive so that Malak could turn her to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Were Shan to turn to the dark side, she would willingly use her [[Force power/Legends|talent]] with Jedi [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]] for the benefit of the Sith Empire and help coordinate Sith ships against those of the Republic in combat. Ulgo and Revan, meanwhile, came under attack from Sith troopers as they fought their way towards the bridge. The Sith fleet, not wishing to kill Shan, did not direct firepower that would destroy the ''Endar Spire''.<ref name="KOTOR" />

[[File:Escapepodkotor.jpg|thumb|left|190px|Revan and Carth Onasi escaped just in time]]
Arriving on the bridge, Revan and Ulgo found several Republic soldiers fending off a Sith squad. Despite their efforts, the Sith cut down the Republic soldiers before Revan and Ulgo could reach them. A group of Sith soldiers caught up to the pair and attacked them. Fending them off, they knew Shan would be attempting to flee in an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]]. Realizing that with Shan gone the Sith would make no hesitation to destroy the ''Endar Spire'', they headed for the escape pods in the starboard section of the ship. As they left the bridge, however, the two were ambushed by Malak's apprentice Darth Bandon.<ref name="KOTOR" />

In order to save Revan, Ulgo instructed him to flee for the escape pods, while he held off Bandon. Revan fled, and having received word from Onasi that Shan had departed in one of the pods, made his way to the bay where the escape capsules were situated. Met by Onasi, Revan was informed by the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] that all the other capsules had been jettisoned, and that the last one was for them. Revan and Onasi boarded the pod, and fled to the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] surface. With Shan having escaped the ship, the Sith fleet destroyed the ''Endar Spire''.<ref name="KOTOR" /><ref name="Campaign" />

===Aftermath===
{{Quote|I've got a feeling that won't be our last battle with the Sith.|Trask Ulgo|audio=TraskUlgo-LastBattle.flac|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
With Shan, Onasi, Revan and other Republic soldiers having fled to the surface of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], the Sith pursued them. In order to stop any of the fugitives from escaping, the Sith used their fleet to [[Destruction of Taris|blockade]] the planet. Deploying troops to the surface, they searched for the escape pods and those who had occupied them. Revan and Onasi landed safely and used an apartment in the [[Upper City]] of Taris as their base of operations to search for Shan, the former passenger on the ''Endar Spire''. Shan had been captured by a [[Swoop gang/Legends|Swoop gang]] known as the [[Black Vulkars/Legends|Black Vulkars]], who offered the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] as the prize for the [[Tarisian Season Opener]] [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop race]]. She was later rescued by Revan and they escaped Taris just before it's [[Destruction of Taris|bombardment]] by Malak.<ref name="KOTOR" />

[[File:TOR_Endar_Spire.png|thumb|200px|The ''Endar Spire''{{'s}} ruins on Taris in [[3643 BBY]]]]
At some point after the bombing the ''Endar Spire'' crashed on Taris. The ship was visited by many generations of Tarisian survivors, and by the time of the [[Great Galactic War]] it had become a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] refuge.<ref name="SWTOR">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>

By [[1032 BBY/Legends|1032 BBY]],<ref name="SWArchive-Engineering with LEGOs: Creating the Ships of ''Knight Errant''">{{SWArchive|url=vault/books/knight_errant_lego/index.html|text=Engineering with LEGOs: Creating the Ships of ''Knight Errant''}}</ref> a [[Fusioncutter/Legends|fusioncutter]] that had been used by a Sith trooper to board the ''Endar Spire'' was amongst the artifacts on display in a [[Arkadia's museum|museum]] on the planet [[Syned]].<ref name="Knight Errant">[[Knight Errant (novel)|''Knight Errant'']]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Attack on the ''Endar Spire'' was the first level featured in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''. The attack is a plot device that formally introduces the characters of Trask Ulgo, Revan, Darth Malak, Darth Bandon and Carth Onasi. It features tutorial points as to the general gameplay in ''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic''. It also introduces the conflict featured throughout the game. For the plot to continue, the escape pods must be reached by the player.<ref name="KOTOR" />

Unlike in later locations in the game, there is very little that the player can do to change the course of the game through gameplay options. Furthermore, nothing the player says or does can influence the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light]] or dark sides of the Force, and gain the player light or dark side points. The sole role play options open to the player in this level involve choosing what to say and how to kill the enemies featured on the ''Endar Spire''.<ref name="KOTOR" />

Although the ship is completely destroyed during the opening act of ''Knights of the Old Republic'', Republic players in ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' can visit and clear out a largely intact wreck that survived both the initial attack and Malak's bombardment.
